description: Cross-site request forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in the administration panel in Piwigo before 2.6.2 allows remote attackers to hijack the authentication of administrators for requests that add users via a pwg.users.add action in a request to ws.php.
references:

http://packetstormsecurity.com/files/125438/Piwigo-2.6.1-Cross-Site-Request-Forgery.html
